ocr_findings.description: Phone number in 学生表 row 1: image shows '090-9999999X' (9 nines) but OCR renders '090-99999999X' (10 nines, extra digit). Same error in row 2: image '080-8888888X' vs OCR '080-88888888X' (extra 8). Data integrity issue for numeric content.

Annotation callout boxes ('名前の修正は1箇所で済む' and '山田太郎くんが転校しても伊藤一郎先生は学校に残る') are rendered as a standalone markdown table fragment rather than as side annotations. Content is preserved but layout context is lost.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 正規化 (normalization) with before/after tables and E-R図 callout. Main prose and bullet points are faithfully captured. The phone number digit inflation (extra repeated digit) is the primary quality concern — it changes numeric data. Annotation boxes are structurally awkward but semantically complete.
